We are looking for additional gym space for our Jan & Feb tournaments!

Registration GuideSite RulesCode of Conduct
Register Now

Site Rules & Regulations

These rules are set by each individual site and must be enforced to ensure continued access.

Important Notice

Questions about site regulations should be sent to your Club Director. HDVL enforces these rules to maintain our facility agreements.

Homedale Schools (HS & MS)

203 E Idaho Ave / 3437 Johnstone Rd, Homedale, ID

Facility Guidelines

  • Spectators: Bleachers provided. $5 gate fee PER day.
  • Players & Spectators: Must leave gym when not playing/officiating.
  • Food & Drink: Only water allowed in the gyms.

Meridian Middle School

1507 W 8th St, Meridian, ID 83642

Facility Guidelines

  • Spectators: Bring your own chair.
  • Food & Drink: Only water allowed in the gyms.

Middleton Schools (HS & MS)

200 S Piccadilly Ave / 1538 Emmett Rd, Middleton, ID

Facility Guidelines

  • Spectators: Bring your own chair.
  • Food & Drink: Only water allowed in the gyms.
  • MHS Note: Use EAST entrance only. No gathering in hallways.

Rise Volleyball Academy

719 N Principle Pl #110, Meridian, ID 83642

Facility Guidelines

  • Spectators: Bring your own chair.
  • Spectators need to leave the gym when their team is not playing.
  • Parking: Rear loading dock side preferred on Friday. Front/Back okay on Saturday.
  • Food & Drink: Allowed inside, but kept off the courts.

The Forge International School

208 S Hartley Ln, Middleton, ID 83644

Facility Guidelines

  • Spectators: TWO spectators per player. Bring your own chair.
  • Players: Must leave gym when not playing/officiating.
  • Food & Drink: Only water allowed in the gyms.

Treasure Valley Athletic Center (TVAC)

1251 E Piper Ct, Meridian, ID 83642

Facility Guidelines

  • Spectators: $5 gate fee. Bleachers available.
  • Parking: Park ONLY in TVAC lot or on the road. Towed at owner expense otherwise.
HDVL

HDVL is the only JVA sanctioned league in Southern Idaho, ensuring a high level of coaching education, player safety, and officiating. Open to teams of all ages (12u-18u) and affiliations (USA, AAU, or none).
